DKT atlas produced by Mindboggle project.
Paper: https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/neuroscience/articles/10.3389/fnins.2012.00171/full
Website: https://mindboggle.readthedocs.io/en/latest/labels.html
ROI labels also found at the website.
Lobe information adapted from: https://www.cis.jhu.edu/~parky/MRN/Desikan%20Region%20Labels%20and%20Descriptions.pdf
